import sys
import math
from math import sin, cos, acos, sqrt

def dist(a, b):
	return sqrt((a[0] - b[0])**2 + (a[1] - b[1])**2)

def dot(a, b):
	return a[0] * b[0] + a[1] * b[1]

def cross(a, b):
	return a[0] * b[1] - a[1] * b[0]

def get_angle(a, b, c):
	ab = dist(a, b)
	ac = dist(a, c)
	bc = dist(b, c)
	cos_a = dot(b, c) / (ab * ac)
	cos_b = dot(a, c) / (ac * bc)
	cos_c = dot(a, b) / (ab * bc)
	A = math.acos(cos_a)
	B = math.acos(cos_b)
	C = math.acos(cos_c)
	return A, B, C
